title: Earth-rock
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Earth|more=Rock}}
[[File:Earth-rock_SWVD.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Yoda's healing earth-rock.]]
'''Earth-rock''' was the name given to a reddish rock found on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]]. It was used by the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] as a healing tool while he was living on the planet.
